name: playwright-automation
description: Athena CLI runs this authored Playwright E2E workflow across sessions - analyze setup, map broad features, explore scoped product areas, plan coverage, generate and review specs, write and review tests, then execute and stabilize them
examplePrompts: Add E2E tests for the login and signup flows at https://myapp.com
Build Playwright coverage for the checkout process
Write E2E tests for the dashboard and settings pages
